programme.desc: Brand new series: Bec attempts to apologise for her text scandal at the sixth dinner party. But apparently that also involves shifting the blame onto someone else. (S13 Ep28)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Eurovision, Citadel, The Greatest Auction, Family Fortunes, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, I Kissed a Boy and The Big Celebrity Detox. (S21 Ep13)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Regina Monologues: The Simpsons go to London with $1000 that Bart found, but Homer crashes the hire car into the Queen and gets locked in the Tower. Tony Blair guest stars. (S15 Ep4/22)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The William Penn Years: Adam makes an inspirational video about a football game against William Penn's rival. Beverly and Murray try to buy a neighbour's house. (S9 Ep4)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: An Itch Like No Other: Barry's poison ivy causes problems for Erica and Geoff. And having Mr Glascott living next door presents a challenge for the whole family. (S9 Ep5)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The Northern Soul One: Nathan loves music and Stoke-on-Trent, so when bride-to-be Beccie gives him free rein to organise their wedding, he plans Northern Soul nuptials.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Come Fly with Me: Jay reluctantly takes Phil out to fly his new model plane, but a manoeuvre goes awry... (S1 Ep3)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Incident: Claire and Mitchell's mother, Dede, drops in for a surprise visit and is determined to make amends with everyone who she offended during 'the incident'. (S1 Ep4)

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Mill Street Bistro (Part 1/2): The owner of the Mill Street Bistro in Ohio claims to have the best menu between New York and LA. But the diners don't agree. (S6 Ep12) [SL]

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Hunt for the Great Albino Pumpkin: Adam is tired of Halloween. Barry and Joanne meet Elvira, Mistress of the Dark. (S9 Ep6)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Rose-Kissy Thing: Beverly encourages Principal Ball to establish a non-athlete Senior Night. Erica struggles to appoint a pre-wedding 'fun captain'. (S9 Ep7)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Go Bullfrogs!: Phil takes Haley to visit his alma mater. Claire goes out with Mitchell and Cameron. Gloria and Jay may have to broach a delicate subject with Manny. (S3 Ep6)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: After the Fire: The Pritchetts rally for a good cause after a neighbour's house burns down, but there's a downside to their Samaritan intentions when Jay throws out his back. (S3 Ep8)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer the Whopper: Homer is chosen to appear in a superhero movie and the film studio hires a celebrity trainer (guest star Seth Rogen) to help him develop a muscular physique. (S21 Ep1/23)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart Gets a 'Z': When Edna Krabappel confiscates her students' phones, Bart gets revenge by spiking her coffee with alcohol, and Principal Skinner fires her for being drunk. (S21 Ep2/23)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Great Wife Hope: The male citizens of Springfield become obsessed with the brutal sport of Ultimate Punching, and Marge ends up getting challenged to step into the ring... (S21 Ep3/23)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A 60-something raver meets a part-time DJ. A competitive Pokémon player hooks up with a comic book fan. And a dog walker and a science guy bond over a love of pub quizzes. (S21 Ep4)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Mill Street Bistro (Part 2/2): In the conclusion to the Mill Street Bistro saga, Gordon's disagreement with the proprietor erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. (S6 Ep13)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back: Marge takes Lisa on a city theatre trip to make up for a rough patch in their relationship. Bart teams up with Maggie to play practical jokes. (S27 Ep18/22)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Fland Canyon: Homer tells Maggie a bedtime story about the Simpson and Flanders families getting stranded when they go on holiday together to the Grand Canyon. (S27 Ep19/22)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Leap Day: Cameron's birthday falls on 29 February, and with the celebrations coming but once every four years, there's loads of pressure on Mitchell to get it right. (S3 Ep17)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Send Out the Clowns: The funeral service for a beloved clown mentor reunites Cameron with his estranged ex-clown partner, Lewis. And Manny has a cool new friend. (S3 Ep18)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer the Whopper: Homer is chosen to appear in a superhero movie and the film studio hires a celebrity trainer (guest star Seth Rogen) to help him develop a muscular physique. (S21 Ep1/23)

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Things get really awkward when the final five are challenged to critique each other's modelling potential. And in the photo shoot they must portray ancient Olympic sports. (S17 Ep10)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Treehouse of Horror Presents Simpsons Wicked This Way Comes: A mysterious tattoo-covered fella at the carnival tells Lisa three surreal stories. (S36 Ep7)

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: (1950) Western starring James Stewart. A gold prospector, tired of reprisal killings between whites and Native Americans, offers a truce to the Apaches' leader. But tensions resurface.

programme.title: Gun Fury
programme.desc: (1953) Western. Rock Hudson stars as a California-bound settler who must ride 1500 miles to the Mexican border to rescue his fiancée (Donna Reed) after she's abducted by an outlaw.

programme.title: Siege of the Saxons
programme.desc: (1963) Dark ages adventure. King Arthur is murdered and usurped by his champion knight (Ronald Howard), so an outlaw (Ronald Lewis) seeks the mystic Merlin (John Laurie) to right the wrong.

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: (1963) Drama. Elizabeth Taylor plays the Egyptian queen who, to protect her realm, uses political guile and her body to woo Julius Caesar (Rex Harrison) and Mark Antony (Richard Burton).

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: (2019) Luc Besson's action-thriller about a young Russian assassin, with Sasha Luss. A scout offers Anna an opportunity to become a model in Paris, but can she escape her links to the KGB?

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: (2019) Partially animated action film based on a popular manga comic. Alita, a deadly cyborg brought back to life by a mourning scientist, sets out to discover her true identity.

programme.title: Sheroes
programme.desc: (2023) She-heroes: action-with-attitude. Three young women transform into a Generation Z version of Charlie's Angels to rescue their mate from a drug lord in Thailand. Cue guns and bikinis.

programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: Terror by Night
programme.desc: (1946) Sherlock Holmes murder-mystery starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Holmes and Dr Watson are employed to protect a priceless diamond. But it's snatched from under their noses.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: (2014) Jamie Foxx stars in this reboot of the 1982 musical. Orphan Annie is transported to post-2008 recession-hit New York, where she becomes the ward of a germaphobe running for mayor.

programme.title: Rosaline
programme.desc: (2022) Literary romcom with Kaitlyn Dever and Isabela Merced. This is the story of Juliet's cousin who gets dumped by Romeo at the start of Shakespeare's play... and she's not too pleased.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: (2019) Roland Emmerich's sprawling, action-packed war drama about the Battle of Midway, a major turning point in World War II. Starring Ed Skrein, Luke Evans and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: (2015) Comedy starring Mark Wahlberg, Will Ferrell and Linda Cardellini. A man's living happily with his wife and stepchildren - until the kids' biological dad swaggers back onto the scene.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: (2003) Superhero fantasy. Ben Affleck is a blind lawyer who turns vigilante by night. Jennifer Garner plays his lover and Colin Farrell the villain who endangers them both. Strong violence.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: Next of Kin
programme.desc: (2021) Found-footage supernatural horror. A young woman visits an Amish community to make a documentary about her family. But there's a good reason why her mum got her away from there...

programme.desc: (2014) Jamie Foxx stars in this reboot of the 1982 musical. Orphan Annie is transported to post-2008 recession-hit New York, where she becomes the ward of a germaphobe running for mayor.

programme.title: Rosaline
programme.desc: (2022) Literary romcom with Kaitlyn Dever and Isabela Merced. This is the story of Juliet's cousin who gets dumped by Romeo at the start of Shakespeare's play... and she's not too pleased.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: (2019) Roland Emmerich's sprawling, action-packed war drama about the Battle of Midway, a major turning point in World War II. Starring Ed Skrein, Luke Evans and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: (2015) Comedy starring Mark Wahlberg, Will Ferrell and Linda Cardellini. A man's living happily with his wife and stepchildren - until the kids' biological dad swaggers back onto the scene.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: (2003) Superhero fantasy. Ben Affleck is a blind lawyer who turns vigilante by night. Jennifer Garner plays his lover and Colin Farrell the villain who endangers them both. Strong violence.

programme.title: On the Come Up
programme.desc: (2022) Jamila Gray stars as Lil' Law- a struggling young rapper who wants to make her fortune to help her family in director Sanaa Lathan's hip-hop-battling-coming-of-fame drama.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: (1950) Western starring James Stewart. A gold prospector, tired of reprisal killings between whites and Native Americans, offers a truce to the Apaches' leader. But tensions resurface.

programme.title: Gun Fury
programme.desc: (1953) Western. Rock Hudson stars as a California-bound settler who must ride 1500 miles to the Mexican border to rescue his fiancée (Donna Reed) after she's abducted by an outlaw.

programme.title: Siege of the Saxons
programme.desc: (1963) Dark ages adventure. King Arthur is murdered and usurped by his champion knight (Ronald Howard), so an outlaw (Ronald Lewis) seeks the mystic Merlin (John Laurie) to right the wrong.

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: (1963) Drama. Elizabeth Taylor plays the Egyptian queen who, to protect her realm, uses political guile and her body to woo Julius Caesar (Rex Harrison) and Mark Antony (Richard Burton).

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: (2019) Luc Besson's action-thriller about a young Russian assassin, with Sasha Luss. A scout offers Anna an opportunity to become a model in Paris, but can she escape her links to the KGB?

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: (2019) Partially animated action film based on a popular manga comic. Alita, a deadly cyborg brought back to life by a mourning scientist, sets out to discover her true identity.

programme.title: Sheroes
programme.desc: (2023) She-heroes: action-with-attitude. Three young women transform into a Generation Z version of Charlie's Angels to rescue their mate from a drug lord in Thailand. Cue guns and bikinis.

programme.title: Man V. Food

programme.title: Man V. Food
programme.desc: Orlando, Florida. Casey Webb heads to Orlando, FL. He faces a famous footlong and takes part in a team challenge with hometown hero, boyband superstar Joey Fatone. S6, Ep10

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Soldiers, Sand and Salads. The team are like kids in a toy store - literally, when they are asked to make a toy shop-themed cake. They also have a beach-themed cake to create. S1, Ep9

programme.title: Cake Boss

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Pub Grub And More. Guy Fieri travels throughout the country looking for real-deal bar food. In a small bar in Philadelphia, he eats a vegan club sandwich with deep fried tofu. S11, Ep1

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: A Little Twisted. Guy Fieri is checking out the unexpected. In Sacramento, he visits a former Japanese grill turned diner that serves European classics. S11, Ep5

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: From Crepes To Kreplach. Guy Fieri heads to Boulder to taste a butter rum caramel cake. In Rego Park, New Jersey, a Jewish deli cooks up stuffed cabbage and kreplach. S11, Ep9

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Porktastic. This trip, Guy is specialising in pork. He tries a chilli with smoked, braised pork. Plus, some fans show Guy their favourite burrito place with pork green chilli sauce. S11, Ep13

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back To Basics
programme.desc: Big Breakfast Buffet. The pressure is on as Ina Garten makes a breakfast buffet for her foodie friends! Dishes include potato pancetta frittata and overnight Belgian waffles. S12, Ep7

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back To Basics
programme.desc: Weekend Guest. Ina Garten's photographer friend is coming for the weekend. She treats him to a menu that includes zucchini and goats cheese tart and tomato carpaccio. S12, Ep8

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back To Basics
programme.desc: Cook Like A Pro: Chicken. It's all about chicken as Ina shares her kitchen tips for roasted chicken with radishes. And, a twist on a classic with chicken and spinach Waldorf salad. S13, Ep1

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back To Basics
programme.desc: Cook Like A Pro: Weeknight Dinners. Ina covers some easy but tasty midweek suppers. She makes roasted salmon tacos with avocado salsa, then cider roasted pork tenderloin. S13, Ep2

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back To Basics
programme.desc: Cook Like A Pro: Fearless Food. Ina tackles daunting dishes with easy techniques, like a perfectly risen soufflé. Guest star Jose Andres has an amazing trick for separating eggs. S13, Ep4

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back To Basics
programme.desc: Cook Like A Pro: Eggs. Ina does a master class in how to cook eggs, from soft boiled to using them in a dressing. Chef Jose Andres reveals the secret of his perfectly fried eggs. S13, Ep5

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking For Less
programme.desc: With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that won't break the budget. S1, Ep6

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Salmon. Jamie Oliver shows how fresh fish can make a cheap dish. He cooks a roast side of salmon with feta and new potatoes, turning the leftovers into a tasty salmon filo pie. S1, Ep3

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Roast Chicken. Chef Jamie Oliver cooks a roast chicken dinner and shows how the leftovers can make delicious budget meals including chickens stew with dumplings. S1, Ep4

programme.title: James Martin's: Island To Highlands
programme.desc: The Royal Scotsman. James's Scottish adventure starts in Edinburgh aboard the luxurious Royal Scotsman. Top chef Nick Nairn joins him to eat in its stunning dining room. S1, Ep17

programme.title: James Martin's: Island To Highlands
programme.desc: The Cairngorms. James heads to the stunning Cairngorms National Park. He's joined by chef pal Nick Nairn for a leg that includes whitewater rafting on the River Spey. S1, Ep18

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: The duo are back in Scotland, in beautiful Dumfries and Galloway. It's a place close to their hearts, a rural paradise with a glorious coastline. S1, Ep2

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: The lads explore Dave's home county of Lancashire. They tour a crisp-making potato farm and create a dish celebrating the local spuds. S1, Ep3

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: For their next adventure in the west of Britain, Dave and Si explore Merseyside, an area renowned for its musical heritage and cultural identity. S1, Ep4

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: The Bikers continue their journey in northwest Wales, discovering a host of inspiring local producers celebrating the area's rich diversity. S1, Ep5

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking For Less

programme.desc: Roast Chicken. Chef Jamie Oliver cooks a roast chicken dinner and shows how the leftovers can make delicious budget meals including chickens stew with dumplings. S1, Ep4

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Old To New. Guy Fieri tries old favourites and new specialities from around America. In Detroit, he enjoys Hungarian pancakes with goulash. And, in Vancouver he eats a modern dish. S12, Ep13

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Quirky Classics. Guy Fieri is on the look-out for one-of-a-kind meals. He visits a Southern/Jewish fusion restaurant that serves Bubby's brisket with beans and rice. S11, Ep4

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Soup And Sandwiches. Guy Fieri is crossing the country for comfort food. In Pineville, he finds a tavern in an 18th century farmhouse that serves snapping turtle soup. S11, Ep8

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Signature Twists. Guy is traveling the country looking for comfort food. In New Orleans, he discovers a place from the 1890s where they serve jambalaya and green bean casserole. S11, Ep12

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Made To Order. In Massachusetts, Guy visits an Italian eatery cooking fresh New England lobster ravioli. In Minnesota a diner serves burger patties stuffed with a range of fillings. S10, Ep7

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Fresh, Filled And Fried. Guy visits a pub in Philadelphia where they deep-fry handmade empanadas. Plus, he checks out a waterfront lobster eatery in Portland, Maine. S10, Ep8

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Family Joints. Host Guy Fieri is heading out for some family cooking. In Kansas City, he visits a soup and sandwich joint that is putting a twist on old favourites. S10, Ep1

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Tried And True. Guy Fieri is stopping for all time classics. In Maine, a snack shack is using the same recipes since 1956. Plus, in California, Guy checks out authentic pizzas. S10, Ep2

programme.title: James Martin's Great British Adventure

programme.title: Rick Stein's Fruits Of The Sea
programme.desc: Rick makes delicious dishes using local, Cornish delicacies. He catches some fine mullet and for the first time attempts to make a fish tagine using a Moroccan recipe. S1, Ep2

programme.title: Rick Stein's Fruits Of The Sea
programme.desc: Rick travels to France to recall some of his early culinary influences. He samples great sea food dishes in Bayonne and famous for the best seafood in France, Marseilles. S1, Ep3

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Four In Hand. Ree shares her portable food ideas. Breakfast bagel burgers are the perfect way to start the day and taco chicken Caesar salad wraps are ideal on-the-go bites. S19, Ep4

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 16-Minute Summertime. Ree makes beef skewers, veg and blue cheese mayo for a quick summertime dinner. Plus, she whips up Pesto chicken and blueberry, lemon and ricotta bruschetta. S19, Ep5

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking For Less
